title: Restore backend/main.mo to Version 12 state

requirements.text: Restore backend/main.mo to its exact Version 12 state by reverting all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16, including any schema changes, new endpoints, modified logic, or removed functionality. The frontend must remain completely untouched.

quotes: Restoring `backend/main.mo` to its exact Version 12 state — reverting all changes from versions 13–16, including schema changes, new endpoints, and modified logic. Frontend stays untouched.

acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo contains only the data types, CRUD operations, and logic that existed in Version 12
All schema changes introduced in versions 13–16 are removed from backend/main.mo
All new endpoints or actor methods added in versions 13–16 are removed from backend/main.mo
All logic modifications introduced in versions 13–16 are reverted in backend/main.mo

requirements.text: Generate a migration.mo file to safely migrate any existing canister state from the current version (16) schema back to the Version 12 schema without data loss when the canister is upgraded and redeployed.
acceptanceCriteria: migration.mo is generated and handles the stable variable shape differences between version 16 and version 12
Canister can be upgraded without trapping or losing existing persisted data
Any fields or entities added in versions 13–16 that do not exist in version 12 are gracefully dropped or mapped during migration

constraints: Do not modify any frontend files
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Modifying or reverting any frontend source files
Introducing new backend features or endpoints beyond what existed in Version 12
Changing the frontend routing, components, hooks, or styles
